Communities Served

What We Do

Everything Your Lawn Needs,
Nothing It Doesn't

From weekly mowing to seasonal deep care — our services cover every inch of your property, every month of the year.

Lawn Mowing

Precision mowing at the right height for your grass type, leaving clean lines and a healthy, even cut every visit.

Edging & Blowing

Crisp edges along driveways, sidewalks and flower beds — finished with a clean blow-off that leaves zero clippings behind.

Hedge Trimming

Expert shaping and trimming that keeps hedges dense, healthy and looking sharp through every season.

Debris Removal

Leaves, branches and storm debris cleared fast — your property stays clean and hazard-free year-round.

Weed Treatment

Targeted weed control that protects your lawn without harming the grass — keeping your yard lush and weed-free.

Seasonal Packages

Year-round care plans tailored to your property — from spring cleanup to fall leaf removal, we handle every season.

See All Service Details →
Why Homeowners Choose Us

Not Just Another
Lawn Service

695+ Homeowners Can't Be Wrong

Real track record, real results. Our client base speaks louder than any ad — and 40+ projects come back to us every year.

Consistent, Year-Round Schedules

Weekly, bi-weekly or seasonal — you choose the frequency. We show up on time, every time, rain plan included.

15 Communities, One Standard

From Simpsonville to Travelers Rest, Taylors to Five Forks — same quality, same attention to detail, wherever you are in the Upstate.

"Your yard is our reputation."

How It Works

From Call to Curb Appeal
in 4 Steps

01

Schedule a Visit

Book a free property visit online or by phone. We assess your yard and listen to what you want.

02

Get Your Plan

Receive a personalized care plan with clear pricing — no hidden fees, no surprises.

03

We Get to Work

Our crew arrives on schedule with professional equipment. You relax while we handle everything.

04

Enjoy Your Yard

Come home to a pristine lawn, every time. We follow up to make sure you're 100% satisfied.

Your Neighbors Already Called Us

Spring is here and spots are filling fast. Get your free property assessment before our schedule locks for the season.

FAQ

Common Questions

How often should my lawn be mowed?

During growing season (spring through fall), we recommend weekly mowing for optimal lawn health. In winter, bi-weekly or monthly visits keep things tidy. We customize frequency to your grass type and property needs.

What areas do you serve?

We serve 15 communities across the Upstate including Greenville, Simpsonville, Mauldin, Greer, Taylors, Travelers Rest, Fountain Inn, Piedmont, Five Forks, Eastside, Berea, Powdersville, Lake Robinson, Verdae and the Augusta Road area.

Do you offer free estimates?

Absolutely. We schedule a free property visit where we walk your yard, assess its needs and provide a personalized care plan with transparent pricing. No obligation, no pressure.

What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?

We monitor weather closely and reschedule automatically — typically to the next available day. You'll receive a notification so you always know when to expect us. No service is ever skipped without rescheduling.

Can I customize my service package?

Yes! Every plan is tailored. You can mix services, adjust frequency and add seasonal extras at any time. We build the plan around your property and budget — not the other way around.
